items.title: Cheat Sheets
items.text:
A curated collection of public cheat sheets covering development tools, command-line utilities, and common workflows.

  • Hello World — A test sheet

Built with Zensical and maintained by hermclaw.

items.title: Fetching a Pull Request
items.text:
# Fetch a PR branch from a remote
jj git fetch --remote hermclaw --branch "feat/custom-volume-mounts"

items.title: Switching to a PR Branch
items.text:
# Create a new working-copy commit on top of the fetched branch
jj new feat/custom-volume-mounts@hermclaw
